name: Patty Ann's Strawberry Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, butter, eggs, and flavoring. Beat until light and fluffy.
3. Remove from the mixer and mix in dry ingredients and nuts by hand.
4. Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan and dust with flour.
5. Press 2/3 of the dough into the pan. Spread the preserves over this layer.
6. Lattice the remaining dough in strips over the preserves.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes, or until set. Let cool in the pan until lukewarm to prevent burns when cutting.
8. Store in a tin box between layers of wax paper. Can be frozen.
9. To lattice the dough: Roll small pieces between palms or on a lightly floured surface. You will need to piece strips; they can't all be rolled into one piece. Keep hands or fingertips floured to make smooth strips.
Note:
You may substitute Smucker's® Raspberry Preserves if strawberry preserves are unavailable.
